hooks.statusMessage: Checking if Chinese translation needs updating...
hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); REL="${FILE#$REPO/}"; case "$REL" in README.md) CN="README_CN.md";; docs/aws-setup.md) CN="docs/aws-setup_CN.md";; docs/azure-setup.md) CN="docs/azure-setup_CN.md";; docs/gcp-setup.md) CN="docs/gcp-setup_CN.md";; docs/oci-setup.md) CN="docs/oci-setup_CN.md";; docs/docker-benchmark.md) CN="docs/docker-benchmark_CN.md";; dashboard/README.md) CN="dashboard/README_CN.md";; *) exit 0;; esac; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"REMINDER: $REL was just updated. You MUST now update the Chinese translation at $REPO/$CN to reflect the same changes. Translate any new or changed prose to Simplified Chinese while keeping code blocks, commands, URLs, and technical terms in English.\"}}"
